issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (When Attacking), not 'Activated'. Activated is for abilities that require manual activation.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text states 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts only for the current turn phase, not through end of turn.
Target should exclude this Character. Add condition or refine target to prevent selecting the attacking Character itself.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] You may K.O. 1 of your Characters other than this Character: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −5 cost during this turn.
